# Onboarding: C Skill
This guide helps you write, lint, and debug safe C code.
## Quickstart Checklist
1. Read SKILL.md for safety and memory discipline.
2. Use tools/ for linting or static analysis (e.g. clang-tidy, cppcheck).
3. See examples/README.md for code skeletons and patterns.
## Troubleshooting
- **Segmentation fault?**
- Check pointer usage and memory allocation.
## Resources
- [SKILL.md](SKILL.md)
- [examples/README.md](examples/README.md)
